segments.text: JACINTA: Hello, Easy Life Cleaning Services, Jacinta speaking.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：您好，这里是轻松生活清洁服务，我是杰辛塔。

segments.text: CLIENT: Oh hello. I'm looking for a cleaning service for my apartment - do you do domestic cleaning?
segments.translation: 顾客：哦，你好。我想找一家清洁服务公司打理我的公寓，你们做家庭清洁吗？

segments.text: JACINTA: Sure.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：当然。

segments.text: CLIENT: Well, it's just a one-bedroom flat. Do you have a basic cleaning package?
segments.translation: 客户：嗯，这只是一套一居室的公寓。你们有常规的清洁套餐吗？

segments.text: JACINTA: Yes. For a one-bedroom flat we're probably looking at about two hours for a clean.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：是的。对于一套一居室的公寓，我们可能要花大约两个小时才能打扫干净。

segments.text: So we'd do a thorough clean of all surfaces in each room, and polish them where necessary.
segments.translation: 我们会彻底清洁每个房间的所有表面，必要时进行抛光。

segments.text: Does your apartment have carpets?
segments.translation: 您的公寓有地毯吗？

segments.text: CLIENT: No, I don't have any, but the floor would need cleaning.
segments.translation: 客户：没有，一块儿也没有，但是地板需要清洁。

segments.text: JACINTA: Of course - we'd do that in every room.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：当然，每个房间的地板都会弄干净。

segments.text: And we'd do a thorough clean of the kitchen and bathroom.
segments.translation: 我们会在厨房和浴室进行彻底清洁。

segments.text: CLIENT: OK.
segments.translation: 客户：好的。

segments.text: JACINTA: Then we have some additional services which you can request if you want - so for example, we can clean your oven for you every week.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：然后我们有一些额外的服务，如果您需要的话可以提出要求。例如，我们可以为您清洁烤箱，一周一次。

segments.text: CLIENT: Actually, I hardly ever use that, but can you do the fridge?
segments.translation: 客户：事实上，我几乎没用过烤箱。但你可以清理冰箱吗？

segments.text: JACINTA: Sure. Would you like that done every week?
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：当然。您希望每周清洁一次吗？

segments.text: CLIENT: Yes, definitely. And would ironing clothes be an additional service you can do?
segments.translation: 顾客：是的，肯定的。熨烫衣服是你能提供的额外服务吗？

segments.text: JACINTA: Yes, of course.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：当然可以。

segments.text: CLIENT: It wouldn't be much, just my shirts for work that week.
segments.translation: 顾客：不会太多，熨烫我一周上班穿的衬衫就可以。

segments.text: JACINTA: That's fine. And we could also clean your microwave if you want.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：可以的。如果你需要的话，我们也可以清理微波炉。

segments.text: CLIENT: No, I wipe that out pretty regularly so there's no need for that.
segments.translation: 客户：不，我经常擦，所以没必要再弄。

segments.text: JACINTA: We also offer additional services that you might want a bit less often, say every month.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：我们还提供您可能不太经常需要的额外服务，比如每个月清理一次的。

segments.text: So for example, if the inside of your windows need cleaning, we could do that.
segments.translation: 例如，如果你的窗户里面需要清洁，我们也可以去做。

segments.text: CLIENT: Yes, that'd be good.
segments.translation: 顾客：好的，那太好了。

segments.text: I'm on the fifteenth floor, so the outside gets done regularly by specialists, but the inside does get a bit grubby.
segments.translation: 我在十五楼，窗户外面经常有专人清理，但里面确实有点脏。

segments.text: JACINTA: And we could arrange for your curtains to get cleaned if necessary.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：如果必要的话，我们可以清洗您的窗帘。

segments.text: CLIENT: No, they're OK. But would you be able to do something about the balcony?
segments.translation: 顾客：不，窗帘还好。但是你们可以在阳台做些清洁工作吗？

segments.text: It's quite small and I don't use it much, but it could do with a wash every month or so.
segments.translation: 它很小，也不常用，但大约每个月清洁一次就可以了。

segments.text: JACINTA: Yes, we can get the pressure washer onto that.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：是的，我们可以用压力清洗机来处理。

segments.text: JACINTA: Now if you're interested, we do offer some other possibilities to do with general maintenance.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：如果您有兴趣的话，我们完成一些普通维护工作。

segments.text: For example, if you have a problem with water and you need a plumber in a hurry, we can put you in touch with a reliable one who can come out straightaway.
segments.translation: 例如，如果您家水管有问题，需要一个水管工，我们可以给您提供可以马上上门的可靠的工人的联系方式。

segments.text: And the same thing if you need an electrician.
segments.translation: 如果需要电工也可以帮您联系。

segments.text: CLIENT: Right. That's good to know.
segments.translation: 客户：好的，知道这个我很高兴。

segments.text: I've only just moved here so I don't have any of those sorts of contacts.
segments.translation: 我刚搬到这里，所以这些人的联系方式我都没有。

segments.text: JACINTA: And I don't know if this is of interest to you, but we also offer a special vacuum cleaning system which can improve the indoor air quality of your home by capturing up to 99% of all the dust in the air.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：我不知道你是否对这个感兴趣，但我们也提供了一种特殊的真空吸尘系统，可以通过捕捉空气中99%的灰尘来改善室内空气质量。

segments.text: So if you're troubled by allergies, this can make a big difference.
segments.translation: 所以，如果您有过敏症的困扰，这可以有很大的改善。

segments.text: CLIENT: Right. In fact, I don't have that sort of problem, but I'll bear it in mind.
segments.translation: 客户：了解。事实上，我没有过敏，但我会记住的。

segments.text: Now can you tell me a bit about your cleaning staff?
segments.translation: 现在你能告诉我一些关于清洁人员的信息吗？

segments.text: JACINTA: Of course. So all our cleaners are very carefully selected.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：当然。我们所有的清洁工都是经过精心挑选的。

segments.text: When they apply to us, they have to undergo a security check with the police to make sure they don't have any sort of criminal background, and, of course, they have to provide references as well.
segments.translation: 当他们向我们提出申请时，他们必须接受警方的安全检查，以确保他们没有任何犯罪背景。当然，他们还必须提供推荐信。

segments.text: Then if we think they might be suitable for the job, we give them training for it.
segments.translation: 然后，如果认为他们可能适合这份工作，我们会为他们提供培训。

segments.text: That lasts for two weeks so it's very thorough, and at the end of it, they have a test.
segments.translation: 培训为期两周，所以非常全面。最后，他们要完成测试。

segments.text: If they pass that, we take them on, but we monitor them very carefully - we ask all our clients to complete a review of their performance after every visit and to email it to us.
segments.translation: 如果通过了，我们会接受他们成为我们的一员。但我们会非常仔细地监督他们。我们请所有客户在每次服务人员上门后完成对他们表现的评价，并通过电子邮件发送给我们。

segments.text: So we can pick up any problems straightaway and deal with them.
segments.translation: 这样我们可以立即发现任何不妥并加以解决。

segments.text: CLIENT: OK, well that all sounds good.
segments.translation: 客户：好的，听起来不错。

segments.text: And will I always have the same cleaner?
segments.translation: 可以一直用一位清洁工吗？

segments.text: JACINTA: Yes, we do our best to organise it that way, and we usually manage it.
segments.translation: 杰辛塔：是的，我们尽最大努力这样安排，而且我们通常可以做到。

segments.text: CLIENT: Good. That's fine. Right, so I'd like to go ahead and …
segments.translation: 顾客：很好。那很好。对了，我想继续……
